overall.description: A maritime ship simulator game showing a first-person view from the vessel's bridge during nighttime navigation. The scene features functional navigation monitors displaying radar, GPS charts, and depth soundings as the ship cruises through open water near a coastline, encountering a brief lightning strike on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge command center with forward deck view

events.description: bright lightning flash strikes the horizon on the starboard side, briefly illuminating the ocean surface

agents.ego_description: operating the vessel from the bridge, monitoring the radar and navigation displays while steering through coastal waters at night

entered.detail: leftmost monitor displaying GPS chart with coastline and vessel position marker
center monitor showing circular radar display with rotating sweep arm
rightmost monitor displaying depth sounder readings and water column data
forward deck of the vessel with railings and deck lighting visible
metal safety railing along the left side of the bridge view
metal safety railing along the right side of the bridge view
dark open water extending to the horizon with subtle wave movement

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a stable view from the ship's bridge, showing the illuminated navigation consoles and the dark ocean ahead. At approximately 2 seconds, a bright lightning flash appears on the right horizon, momentarily lighting up the sea surface before returning to darkness. The radar display continues its steady rotation throughout, and the vessel maintains its forward course through the calm waters.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge command center with forward deck view

agents.ego_description: continuing to navigate the vessel through the night, maintaining course while observing the radar for other traffic

segments.scene_description: The vessel continues its steady cruise through the dark coastal waters with no further weather events. The navigation monitors remain active with the radar sweeping continuously, and the ship maintains a stable heading as it progresses through the open water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady first-person perspective from a ship's bridge as it navigates a dark ocean under a flickering night sky. It begins with a stable view of illuminated navigation consoles and the black expanse of the sea ahead. As the vessel maintains its forward course, a sudden, bright lightning flash erupts on the right horizon, momentarily illuminating the water's surface before the environment returns to deep darkness. The scene then settles into a continuous, calm cruise through coastal waters, with the radar display sweeping steadily on the monitors. The camera remains fixed on the horizon as the ship progresses through the open water under a now-silent sky.
